effects.ambiguity_policy: read-after-write typed reconciliation; generic shell execution forbidden
effects.causation: fresh signed failover plan and exact operation hash
effects.idempotency: global Witness reservation plus typed operation id
effects.name: arvan_route_switch
effects.notes: The source CLI remains validation-only until a reviewed typed deployment backend is injected.
effects.readiness: route state must match target and public verification before completion

effects.ambiguity_policy: adding an email provider requires a new durable inventory entry and tests
effects.name: email
effects.notes: No runtime email provider exists at this revision.

effects.ambiguity_policy: HEAD/read-back verification resolves response loss; untracked local residue is quarantined
effects.causation: committed chat/file record and blob manifest
effects.destination_identity: bucket, opaque object key, ciphertext hash, and provider version id
effects.idempotency: plaintext content hash plus encryption context and destination
effects.name: encrypted_blob_object_storage
effects.notes: User bytes are client-side encrypted before leaving a site; S3 metadata contains no plaintext identity.
effects.readiness: ciphertext/version parity and no unresolved orphan quarantine item

effects.ambiguity_policy: never used as proof of commit or cross-site convergence
effects.idempotency: not required; clients reload canonical state after reconnect
effects.name: realtime_redis_and_websocket
effects.notes: Redis/SSE/WebSocket traffic is a disposable wake-up hint over canonical database state.
effects.readiness: excluded from durable parity; connection health only

effects.ambiguity_policy: ambiguous provider response is manual-review and not retried
effects.name: sms_account_recovery
effects.notes: Informational recovery SMS is enqueued transactionally with the recovery state change.

effects.ambiguity_policy: provider-start ambiguity is persisted and never blindly retried
effects.causation: OTP challenge or invitation delivery row
effects.claim: domain ledger claim bridged through Writer-epoch capability immediately before send
effects.destination_identity: normalized mobile hash plus domain record
effects.idempotency: OTP claim id or invitation_sms_deliveries uniqueness
effects.name: sms_otp_and_invitation
effects.notes: Existing specialized OTP/invitation ledgers remain authoritative; strict mode adds final Writer-term validation.

effects.ambiguity_policy: expired sending lease requires reconciliation/manual decision
effects.destination_identity: recipient user id plus Telegram id snapshot
effects.name: telegram_admin_broadcast
effects.notes: Broadcast-level status is derived from per-recipient receipts.
effects.readiness: broadcast complete only when every receipt is terminal

effects.ambiguity_policy: queue-v1 preserves provider outcome and dependency anchors; legacy UI response never proves a business commit
effects.causation: Telegram update plus explicit interaction/pre-auth source key
effects.claim: queue-v1 leased worker claim or legacy synchronous handler ownership
effects.destination_identity: originating Telegram chat and immutable recipient snapshot
effects.idempotency: queue-v1 dedupe/source anchor; legacy mode owns one update handler
effects.name: telegram_interaction_transport
effects.notes: These adapters select durable queue ownership at runtime while retaining a fail-closed legacy compatibility path.
effects.readiness: queue-v1 due/ambiguous interaction backlog; legacy path contributes only provider error rate

effects.ambiguity_policy: never infer business commit from UI response; user can refresh/reissue
effects.causation: one Telegram update/callback handled by Bot-FI
effects.claim: single Bot update handler; no asynchronous business delivery promise
effects.idempotency: Telegram update processing and persisted business command identity where mutation occurs
effects.name: telegram_interactive_ui
effects.notes: Menus, callback acknowledgements, exports, and message cleanup are rebuildable UI—not durable business notifications.
effects.readiness: excluded from business convergence; monitored as Bot API error rate

effects.ambiguity_policy: unknown response is retained for bounded reconciliation
effects.name: telegram_market_transition_notice
effects.notes: Market-open and market-close notices are foreign-local effects.
effects.readiness: no overdue non-terminal market notice receipt

effects.ambiguity_policy: unknown send result remains failed/lagged for reconciliation; integration must preserve candidate queue semantics
effects.causation: offer public id, home authority, and offer version
effects.claim: foreign publication worker serializes the persisted publication state
effects.destination_identity: channel id and persisted Telegram message id
effects.name: telegram_offer_publication_and_edit
effects.notes: The sibling candidate/telegram-offer-publication-queue owns the final queue implementation; integration must not regress this contract.

effects.ambiguity_policy: expired sending claim is terminal/manual-review; never blind retry
effects.destination_identity: recipient user id plus Telegram id snapshot
effects.name: telegram_private_notification_outbox
effects.notes: Project membership and other asynchronous private notifications use one row per recipient.

effects.ambiguity_policy: ambiguous provider start is preserved and not blindly retried
effects.causation: OTP challenge or registration command id
effects.idempotency: OTP claim id or registration command receipt
effects.name: telegram_registration_otp_and_handoff
effects.notes: Join-request replies are derived handoff messages; registration state remains authoritative in the durable command/OTP ledger.
effects.readiness: unresolved OTP and registration command claims

effects.ambiguity_policy: expired processing lease is reconciled and never blindly resent
effects.causation: trade_completed event type and trade number
effects.destination_identity: recipient user id plus Telegram id at send
effects.name: telegram_trade_delivery
effects.notes: One receipt exists per event, trade, recipient, and channel.
effects.readiness: all required trade delivery receipts terminal

effects.ambiguity_policy: ambiguous effect is never automatically retried; 404/410 only terminalizes that endpoint
effects.causation: immutable DR event in the authoritative business transaction
effects.destination_identity: hash of exact push subscription endpoint
effects.idempotency: event, effect type, and endpoint hash unique effect key
effects.name: webpush_market_and_notification
effects.notes: Provider fanout is represented by one durable effect per subscription endpoint.
effects.readiness: no ambiguous effect and no due non-terminal endpoint effect
